subcodes.first_line: The ocean of divine knowledge hath surged when the fragrance of the All-Merciful was stirred. Hasten ye, O people of Bahá, unto the crimson Ark... blessed art thou [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ماج بحر العرفان اذ هاج عرف الرحمن ان اقبلوا یا اهل البهاء الی السفینه الحمراء ... طوبا لک
subcodes.subjects: @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @Crimson Ark; the Ark of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
